2026-04-17T06:48:51.3839648Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T06:48:51.3840058Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T06:48:51.3840422Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T06:48:51.3840715Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T06:48:51.3840952Z [36;1m[0m

The 1.2.0-beta.1 release (now shipping as beta.3) added several new resource types — `DnsNaptrRecord`, `DnsTlsaRecord`, `DnsDSRecord`, `DnssecConfig`, and `SigningKeys` on `DnsZoneData` — none of which are documented in the README.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- The `## Next steps` section in `README.md` links to a personal user fork (`dvbb`) rather than the official `Azure/azure-sdk-for-net` repository — both links are broken and will 404 for external users\\n- The actual local samples (`Sample2_ManagingPtrRecord.md`) are mislinked: the README says `Sample2_ManagingRecordSetPtrs.md` (wrong filename) and wrong base URL\\n- No README documentation or code snippets for the new `DnssecConfig` resource (DNSSEC configuration) introduced in 1.2.0-beta.1\\n- No README documentation or code snippets for `DnsNaptrRecord`, `DnsTlsaRecord`, or `DnsDSRecord` record types introduced in 1.2.0-beta.1\\n- No test-backed sample file in `tests/Samples/` for DNSSEC workflows or the new record types\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n#### Fix broken links in README\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/README.md`\\n**Action:** Edit\\n\\nReplace the broken `## Next steps` sample links. The links currently point to `dvbb`\\u0026#39;s fork with an incorrect filename. Change them to point to the official repository and correct filenames:\\n\\n```markdown\\n### More sample code\\n\\n- [Managing DNS Zones](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/samples/Sample1_ManagingDNSZones.md)\\n- [Managing PTR Record Sets](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/samples/Sample2_ManagingPtrRecord.md)\\n```\\n\\n#### Add DNSSEC section to README\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/README.md`\\n**Action:** Edit — insert after the `### Delete a Dns zone` example and before `## Troubleshooting`\\n\\n```markdown\\n### Enable DNSSEC on a DNS zone\\n\\n```\\nArmClient armClient = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await armClient.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\nstring rgName = \\u0026#34;myRgName\\u0026#34;;\\nResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(rgName);\\nDnsZoneCollection dnsZoneCollection = resourceGroup.GetDnsZones();\\nstring dnsZoneName = \\u0026#34;sample.com\\u0026#34;;\\nDnsZoneResource dnsZone = await dnsZoneCollection.GetAsync(dnsZoneName);\\n// Enable DNSSEC on the zone\\nDnssecConfigResource dnssecConfig = await dnsZone.GetDnssecConfig().CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed);\\nConsole.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;DNSSEC enabled, provisioning state: {dnssecConfig.Data.ProvisioningState}\\u0026#34;);\\n` `` `\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n1. **Write the sample code** in a new test file at `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/tests/Samples/Sample3_ManagingDnssec.cs`\\n\\n   Use this structure (following the existing pattern in `Sample1_ManagingDnsZones.cs`):\\n\\n   ```\\n   // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n   // Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\n   using System;\\n   using System.Threading.Tasks;\\n   using Azure.Identity;\\n   using Azure.ResourceManager;\\n   using Sample3_ManagingDnssec\\n       {\\n           [Test]\\n           [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample builds\\u0026#34;)]\\n           public async Task EnableDnssec()\\n           {\\n               #region Snippet:Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable\\n               ArmClient armClient = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n               SubscriptionResource subscription = await armClient.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n               string rgName = \\u0026#34;myRgName\\u0026#34;;\\n               ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(rgName);\\n               DnsZoneCollection dnsZoneCollection = resourceGroup.GetDnsZones();\\n               string dnsZoneName = \\u0026#34;sample.com\\u0026#34;;\\n               DnsZoneResource dnsZone = await dnsZoneCollection.GetAsync(dnsZoneName);\\n               // Enable DNSSEC on the zone — creates or updates the DnssecConfig child resource\\n               DnssecConfigResource dnssecConfig = (await dnsZone.GetDnssecConfig().CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed)).Value;\\n               Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;DNSSEC enabled, provisioning state: {dnssecConfig.Data.ProvisioningState}\\u0026#34;);\\n               #endregion Snippet:Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable\\n           }\\n       }\\n   }\\n   ```\\n\\n2. **Add placeholder in README** at the location described in Step 1 (after `### Delete a Dns zone`):\\n\\n   ````markdown\\n   ### Enable DNSSEC on a DNS zone\\n\\n   `````C# Snippet:Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable\\n   ```\\n   `````\\n\\n   ``: `Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable`\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README currently contains all required The 1.2.0-beta.1 release (now shipping as beta.3) added several new resource types — `DnsNaptrRecord`, `DnsTlsaRecord`, `DnsDSRecord`, `DnssecConfig`, and `SigningKeys` on `DnsZoneData` — none of which are documented in the README.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- The `## Next steps` section in `README.md` links to a personal user fork (`dvbb`) rather than the official `Azure/azure-sdk-for-net` repository — both links are broken and will 404 for external users\\n- The actual local samples (`Sample2_ManagingPtrRecord.md`) are mislinked: the README says `Sample2_ManagingRecordSetPtrs.md` (wrong filename) and wrong base URL\\n- No README documentation or code snippets for the new `DnssecConfig` resource (DNSSEC configuration) introduced in 1.2.0-beta.1\\n- No README documentation or code snippets for `DnsNaptrRecord`, `DnsTlsaRecord`, or `DnsDSRecord` record types introduced in 1.2.0-beta.1\\n- No test-backed sample file in `tests/Samples/` for DNSSEC workflows or the new record types\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n#### Fix broken links in README\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/README.md`\\n**Action:** Edit\\n\\nReplace the broken `## Next steps` sample links. DNS zones using this API is no longer allowed. Please use privatednszones resource instead of dnszones resource.\\n```\\n\\nwhen trying to create private DNS zone with following codes:\\n\\n\\n```cs\\nvar dnsZones = resourceGroupResource.GetDnsZones();\\nvar dnsZoneData = new DnsZoneData(\\\"Global\\\")\\n{\\n    ZoneType = DnsZoneType.Private\\n};\\n\\nawait dnsZones.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, \\\"privatelink.redisenterprise.cache.azure.net\\\", dnsZoneData);\\n```\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nExpect DNS Zone to be created successfully\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nDNS Zone does not create successfully\\n\\n### Reproduction Steps\\n\\nSee bug description\\n\\n### Environment\\n\\n_No response_\",\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"youn123\",\"id\":19635090,\"node_id\":\"MDQ6VXNlcjE5NjM1MDkw\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19635090?v=4\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/youn123\",\"gravatar_id\":\"\",\"type\":\"User\",\"site_admin\":false,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/events{/privacy}\",\"following_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/following{/other_user}\",\"followers_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/followers\",\"gists_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/gists{/gist_id}\",\"organizations_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/orgs\",\"received_events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/received_events\",\"repos_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/repos\",\"starred_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/starred{/owner}{/repo}\",\"subscriptions_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/youn123/subscriptions\"},\"labels\":[{\"id\":942601196,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/labels/Network%20-%20DNS\",\"name\":\"Network -
